description: Fix beta detection (publicMetadata), create /pricing page with Clerk PricingTable, remove free tier, thorough cleanup

userStories.title: Add Clerk Public Metadata Types and Beta Helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I want typed public metadata and a shared beta detection helper so that both client and server code can reliably check beta status from publicMetadata instead of Clerk entitlements.
acceptanceCriteria: Create or update types/globals.d.ts with ClerkPublicMetadata interface: { features?: { beta_access?: boolean } }
Extend Clerk's UserPublicMetadata type globally so useUser().publicMetadata is typed
Add isBetaFromMetadata(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): boolean helper in src/lib/billing/utils.ts that checks metadata.features.beta_access === true
Keep existing isBetaAuth() temporarily for backward compat (will be removed in US-003)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)

userStories.title: Fix Server-Side Beta Detection to Use Public Metadata
userStories.description: As a beta user, I want server-side feature gates to recognize my beta status from publicMetadata so that API calls are not blocked.
acceptanceCriteria: Update isBetaAuth() in src/lib/billing/utils.ts to check sessionClaims.metadata (publicMetadata) instead of has({ feature: FEATURE_BETA_ACCESS })
Update AuthWithHas interface to include sessionClaims with metadata — or create a new type that accepts the auth object shape from Clerk's auth()
requireFeature middleware in src/server/api/trpc.ts works with publicMetadata beta check
requirePlan middleware in src/server/api/trpc.ts works with publicMetadata beta check
getCurrentPlan in src/server/api/routers/billing.ts uses publicMetadata beta check
getUsage in src/server/api/routers/billing.ts uses publicMetadata beta check
AI router beta checks in src/server/api/routers/ai.ts use publicMetadata beta check
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Server-side: auth() returns sessionClaims which includes publicMetadata. Access via auth.sessionClaims?.metadata or similar. Check Clerk's actual auth() return shape.

userStories.title: Fix Client-Side Beta Detection to Use Public Metadata
userStories.description: As a beta user, I want client-side components to recognize my beta status from publicMetadata so that I don't see paywalls.
acceptanceCriteria: UpgradePrompt in src/components/billing/upgrade-prompt.tsx uses useUser().publicMetadata instead of has({ feature: FEATURE_BETA_ACCESS })
BillingTab in src/app/(protected)/settings/_components/billing-tab.tsx uses useUser().publicMetadata for beta detection
Pricing component in src/app/(marketing)/_components/pricing.tsx uses useUser().publicMetadata for beta detection
usage-limit-banner.tsx uses useUser().publicMetadata for beta detection (if it references beta)
Remove FEATURE_BETA_ACCESS constant from src/lib/constants/billing.ts (no longer needed)
Remove all imports of FEATURE_BETA_ACCESS across the codebase
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Client-side: use useUser() hook from @clerk/nextjs, access user.publicMetadata.features?.beta_access. The useUser hook is different from useAuth — useAuth has has() but useUser has publicMetadata.

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Beta Detection Fix
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests verifying beta users bypass all feature gates using the new publicMetadata approach.
acceptanceCriteria: Update tests in tests/integration/billing.test.ts to mock beta via publicMetadata (not has({ feature }))
Update tests/integration/entitlements.test.ts to mock beta via publicMetadata
Test: beta user (publicMetadata.features.beta_access = true) can access Starter-gated features
Test: beta user can access Pro-gated features (AI chat, reports, PDF)
Test: beta user gets unlimited AI usage (no limits enforced)
Test: non-beta user without plan gets denied
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: The test helpers likely mock clerkAuth with a has() function. Need to also provide sessionClaims.metadata to match the new beta detection path.

userStories.title: Create /pricing Page with Clerk PricingTable
userStories.description: As a user clicking Upgrade, I want to land on a working /pricing page so I can select and purchase a plan.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/(marketing)/pricing/page.tsx route
Page renders Clerk's <PricingTable> component (import from @clerk/nextjs)
Style PricingTable using Clerk's appearance API to match Terminal design: dark bg #050505, primary accent #d4ff00, monospace fonts
Page has proper metadata (title: Pricing | EdgeJournal)
Page is accessible to both authenticated and unauthenticated users
Falls back gracefully if PricingTable has no plans configured (show message)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser: /pricing loads without 404
userStories.notes: Clerk PricingTable is a drop-in component. Use appearance prop for theming. Terminal tokens: bg #050505, primary #d4ff00, secondary #00d4ff, font-family monospace.

userStories.title: Remove Free Tier from Constants and Billing Utils
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the free tier removed from billing constants so the system only knows about Starter and Pro.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove PLAN_FREE export from src/lib/constants/billing.ts
Remove free tier entry from PLAN_METADATA
Add PLAN_NONE constant for the no-subscription state
Update getEffectivePlan() in src/lib/billing/utils.ts to return PLAN_NONE instead of PLAN_FREE
Update hasPlanAccess() if it references PLAN_FREE
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: PLAN_NONE represents 'user has no subscription' — it replaces PLAN_FREE semantically. Users in this state see upgrade prompts for all gated features.

Remove PLAN_FREE imports from billing router
getUsage still works correctly for users with no plan (returns zero usage, null limits)
